lsp-mcp.configuration.title: LSP MCP Server Configuration
lsp-mcp.configuration.enabled.descriptio: Enable or disable the LSP MCP server.
lsp-mcp.configuration.port.description: Preferred port for the shared LSP MCP broker.
lsp-mcp.configuration.cors.enabled.descr: Enable or disable CORS (Cross-Origin Resource Sharing). Disabled by default; enable it only for browser-based MCP clients.
Allowed origins for CORS. Use '*' to allow all origins, or provide a comma-separated list of origins (e.g., 'http://localhost:3000,http://localhost:5173').
lsp-mcp.configuration.cors.withCredentia: Whether to allow credentials (cookies, authorization headers) in CORS requests.
lsp-mcp.configuration.cors.exposeHeaders: Headers that browsers are allowed to access. Provide a comma-separated list of headers (e.g., 'Mcp-Session-Id,Content-Type').
lsp-mcp.configuration.maxResults.descrip: Maximum number of items returned for list-type results such as workspace_symbols. Prevents excessive token usage.
lsp-mcp.configuration.outputFormat.descr: Output format for LSP operation results. 'json' for machine-readable JSON, 'markdown' for LLM-friendly Markdown.
Path markers used to classify third-party dependencies for reference filtering and call hierarchy ordering.
lsp-mcp.configuration.mcpLocale.descript: Language for MCP tool descriptions and responses. 'none' follows VS Code display language.
lsp-mcp.configuration.operations.hover.d: Enable hover. Shows signature and documentation at a position.
lsp-mcp.configuration.operations.definit: Enable definition. Navigate to the definition location of a symbol.
lsp-mcp.configuration.operations.declara: Enable declaration. Navigate to the declaration location of a symbol.
lsp-mcp.configuration.operations.type_de: Enable type_definition. Navigate to the type definition location of a symbol.
lsp-mcp.configuration.operations.impleme: Enable implementation. Navigate to the implementation location(s) of a symbol.
lsp-mcp.configuration.operations.referen: Enable references. Find all semantic references to a symbol.
lsp-mcp.configuration.operations.documen: Enable document_highlight. Find semantic occurrences of a symbol in the current document.
lsp-mcp.configuration.operations.prepare: Enable prepare_call_hierarchy. Part of the call hierarchy flow (prepare_call_hierarchy → incoming_calls/outgoing_calls); keep them enabled together or returned callId values cannot be traversed.
lsp-mcp.configuration.operations.incomin: Enable incoming_calls. Find callers of a symbol via a callId from prepare_call_hierarchy. Part of the call hierarchy flow; keep prepare_call_hierarchy enabled.
lsp-mcp.configuration.operations.outgoin: Enable outgoing_calls. Find callees of a symbol via a callId from prepare_call_hierarchy. Part of the call hierarchy flow; keep prepare_call_hierarchy enabled.
lsp-mcp.configuration.operations.documen: Enable document_symbols. Get the symbol outline (tree) of one document.
lsp-mcp.configuration.operations.workspa: Enable workspace_symbols. Search symbols across the entire workspace by query.
lsp-mcp.configuration.operations.signatu: Enable signature_help. Get signatures and active-parameter information at a call site.
lsp-mcp.configuration.operations.inlay_h: Enable inlay_hints. Get inferred type and parameter-name hints for a document range.
lsp-mcp.configuration.operations.documen: Enable document_links. Get navigable document links exposed by the active language extension.
lsp-mcp.configuration.operations.diagnos: Enable diagnostics. Get diagnostics for one file with optional severity, source, and code filters.
lsp-mcp.configuration.operations.workspa: Enable workspace_diagnostics. Get filtered diagnostics under a workspace path.
lsp-mcp.configuration.operations.diagnos: Enable diagnostics_refresh. After a code change, refresh and wait for settled diagnostics of one file; returns current diagnostics with a status (stable or in_progress).
lsp-mcp.configuration.operations.workspa: Enable workspace_diagnostics_refresh. After a code change, refresh and wait for settled diagnostics under a workspace path; returns current diagnostics with a status.
lsp-mcp.configuration.operations.code_ac: Enable code_actions. List editable Code Actions at a position. Part of the Code Action flow (code_actions → code_action_preview → code_action_apply); keep them enabled together.
Enable code_action_preview. Preview one listed Code Action without side effects. Part of the Code Action flow; keep code_action_apply enabled or the preview cannot be applied.
lsp-mcp.configuration.operations.fix_doc: Enable fix_document_preview. Preview editable fix-all or quick-fix edits for an entire document. Feeds code_action_apply; keep it enabled.
lsp-mcp.configuration.operations.code_ac: Enable code_action_apply. Apply one previously previewed Code Action. Disabling it leaves code_action_preview / fix_document_preview transactions unable to apply.
lsp-mcp.configuration.operations.prepare: Enable prepare_rename. Locate and validate a rename candidate. Part of the rename flow (prepare_rename → rename_preview → rename_apply); keep all three enabled together.
lsp-mcp.configuration.operations.rename_: Enable rename_preview. Preview a symbol rename without modifying files. Part of the rename flow; keep rename_apply enabled or the previewed renameId cannot be applied.
Enable rename_apply. Apply one previously previewed rename. Disabling it leaves rename_preview transactions unable to apply.
lsp-mcp.configuration.operations.class_f: Enable class_file_contents (Java/JDT decompiled source via jdt:// URI). Safe to disable if you don't work with Java.
